diagnostics.message: Element label uses unsupported dynamic content. Use literal child text or a supported same-file deterministic string expression.

matches.agentDescription: Reviews and applies coupon codes before the order is submitted
Edits the coupon code before checkout discounts are applied
Applies the current coupon code to the in-progress checkout
Saves the current cart, shipping, and payment selections without charging the order
Completes checkout and charges the selected payment method
Removes the Starter Kit line before submitting the order

source_inventory.label: Reviews and applies coupon codes before the order is submitted
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <AICForm agentDescription="Reviews and applies coupon codes before the order is submitted" agentId="checkout.discount_form" agentRisk="low" agentWorkflowStep="checkout.review.discount" style={{ display: "grid", gap: 12 }} >

source_inventory.label: Edits the coupon code before checkout discounts are applied
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <AICInput agentDescription="Edits the coupon code before checkout discounts are applied" agentId="checkout.coupon_code" agentLabel="Coupon code" agentRisk="low" />

source_inventory.label: Apply coupon
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <AICButton agentAction="submit" agentDescription="Applies the current coupon code to the in-progress checkout" agentId="checkout.apply_coupon" agentRisk="low" >

source_inventory.label: Save cart
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <AICButton agentAction="click" agentDescription="Saves the current cart, shipping, and payment selections without charging the order" agentId="checkout.save_cart" agentRisk="medium" >

source_inventory.label: Submit order
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <AICButton agentAction="submit" agentDescription="Completes checkout and charges the selected payment method" agentId="checkout.submit_order" agentRisk="critical" >

source_inventory.label: Remove Starter Kit
source_inventory.opening_tag_signature: <AICButton agentAction="click" agentDescription="Removes the Starter Kit line before submitting the order" agentId="checkout.order_line.remove.line_starter_kit" agentRisk="medium" >
